**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Tuyiyuan Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is a specimen of a 'single-person software and security integration outsourcing studio' that was overly deified by the official system due to the abuse of 'manufacturing' terms. The forensic engine has forcefully cleaned the underlying preset Apple Inc. consumer electronics massive OEM data. The official registry system was clearly blinded by the extremely hardcore vocabulary in its license, such as 'integrated circuit chip and product manufacturing' and 'industrial control computer and system manufacturing,' slapping it directly with the heavy-asset tag of 'Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the physical probe mercilessly revealed its miniaturized baseline: a paid-in capital of a mere 100,000 RMB, and a 2024 insured headcount of a dismal '1 person.' Its registered address is 'Zone C, 7th Floor, No. 137 Cangxiang.' Employing one worker and holding 100,000 RMB to 'manufacture integrated circuit chips' on the seventh floor of a commercial office building in the city center? This is an ultimate insult to the common sense of the semiconductor industry. Stripping away the 'manufacturing' words used for window dressing and invoicing purposes, the front section of its license is extremely honest: 'software development; software sales; AI application software development.' The diagnostic conclusion is extremely clear: this is fundamentally not a chip manufacturing plant or industrial PC production factory. This is a 'One-Person Software & Trading Studio' (micro software development, weak-current security integration, and electronic product reselling studio). The boss (Hang Jianjun) is highly likely a programmer or weak-current engineer who registered this company to take on freelance coding jobs or to legally issue hardware procurement invoices when installing security surveillance and industrial control computers for clients.
